operation_name: BIG_LOTTO canonical research sample segregation — add-on prize and non-canonical row family exclusion from research dataset

apply_authorization_required.description: No DB write, migration, or row movement may be performed without a separate explicit Type D authorization. This plan artifact authorizes design only.
forbidden_without_authorization: Any INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, or CREATE on lottery_v2.db
Any row movement or archive operation
Any view creation that modifies query behavior for production consumers

ADD_ON_PRIZE_EXCLUDED.policy: PRESERVE — do not delete. These are valid lottery-related records.
allowed_operations: Move to segregation/audit table that preserves all columns and values
Add metadata column (e.g. row_family, exclusion_reason) to identify family
Create exclusion view or filter for research queries only
forbidden_operations: DELETE FROM draws WHERE draw LIKE '%-%'
Describe as fake, simulated, synthetic, or invalid in any audit log or table comment

DATE_FORMAT_ALIEN.policy: PRESERVE — cautious handling. Non-canonical concern; may be a different game.
forbidden_operations: Claim as definitively fake without domain confirmation

SMALL_POOL_ALIEN.policy: PRESERVE — cautious handling. Non-canonical concern; likely mislabeled game.
forbidden_operations: Claim as definitively fake without domain confirmation

proposed_db_write_scope.note: These are proposed operations only. None may be executed without Type D explicit human gate authorization.

phase_2_segregation_table.description: Create draws_big_lotto_excluded table (or equivalent audit/quarantine table). Move non-canonical rows. Preserve all columns and values.

sql_filters.DATE_FORMAT_ALIEN: LENGTH(draw)=8 AND draw LIKE '20%' AND draw NOT LIKE '%-%'
sql_filters.SMALL_POOL_ALIEN: Requires Python-driven inspection: max(numbers_as_list) <= 25 per row

phase_2_segregation_table.approach_preference: Additive segregation table preferred over in-place deletion. Research queries exclude non-canonical rows via WHERE clause or research view, not by permanent deletion.

phase_3_research_exclusion_view.description: Create or update a research-population view that filters to CANONICAL_MAIN_DRAW rows only.
phase_3_research_exclusion_view.filter_logic: draw NOT LIKE '%-%' AND LENGTH(draw) < 8 AND max_number > 25
phase_3_research_exclusion_view.note: View is for research queries only; original draws table retains all rows including segregated families.

phase_4_verification.description: Verify canonical row count and drift guard after segregation.
phase_4_verification.no_side_effects_check: Counts for POWER_LOTTO, DAILY_539, and all non-BIG_LOTTO types must be unchanged

pre_apply_checks: P246B taxonomy correction artifact is on main and tests pass
DB backup does not already exist for this operation date
No other DB write is in progress

post_apply_reconciliation.canonical_main_draw_count_check: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM draws WHERE lottery_type='BIG_LOTTO' AND draw NOT LIKE '%-%' ...
post_apply_reconciliation.excluded_table_count_check: SELECT row_family, COUNT(*) FROM draws_big_lotto_excluded GROUP BY row_family
post_apply_reconciliation.replay_rows_unchanged: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM strategy_prediction_replays -- must remain 94,924
post_apply_reconciliation.non_big_lotto_unchanged: SELECT lottery_type, COUNT(*) FROM draws WHERE lottery_type != 'BIG_LOTTO' GROUP BY lottery_type

what_this_plan_does_not_authorize: No strategy development or promotion on BIG_LOTTO
BIG_LOTTO research gate remains blocked until segregation is executed, verified, and a clean re-audit passes
final_decision: P247 is a corrected exclusion/segregation plan for BIG_LOTTO canonical research sample separation. It replaces the prior P246 quarantine plan's language of contamination removal with a preservation-first segregation approach. ADD_ON_PRIZE_EXCLUDED rows are to be moved to an audit/segregation table, not deleted. DB apply requires a separate explicit Type D authorization. No action in this artifact changes any DB state, production recommendation, strategy, or research gate.
